case_title: CHAE CHUNG LIN VS. MICHAEL ASAY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ASAY, MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR NOV-02-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON NOV-02-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MICHAEL ASAY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: M. JONES; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
